heading: Oath of Comptroller
label: 3 Oath of Comptroller
text: The Comptroller of the Currency shall, within fifteen days from the time of notice of his appointment, take and subscribe the oath of office.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 326 derived from , , which was the National Bank Act. See .act June 3, 1864, ch. 106, § 113 Stat. 99section 38 of this title

Amendments1972— struck out provisions which required the Comptroller to give a bond in the sum of $250,000.Pub. L. 92–3101959— increased the surety bond requirement from $100,000 to $250,000.Pub. L. 86–251
